properties.name: Pedrógão Grande / Pampilhosa da Serra (2017 mega-fire scar)
properties.description: Validation AOI covering the 2017 mega-fire complex — the deadly June 2017 Pedrógão Grande fire (66 fatalities, ~30,000 ha in the first event) and the October 2017 Centro complex that swept Pampilhosa da Serra and Lousã (together forming the ~45,000 ha complex). Long-term reference signal for ICNF Áreas Ardidas; dense OSM critical-infrastructure coverage validated via scripts/00_overpass_smoke.py. Promoted from alt_pedrogao_grande.geojson (2026-06-16) for WU-18 widened validation. Source: Áreas Ardidas ICNF (https://www.icnf.pt/florestas/gfr/gfrint/ifiarf); event report https://www.icnf.pt/portal/florestas/dfci/resource/doc/inc-2017/rel-prov-17jun-a-15out2017.pdf (accessed 2026-06-16). Copernicus EMS partial activation for the 2017 event.
properties.rationale: Strongest historical-burn signal in continental Portugal — the largest single-day loss of life in a Portuguese fire in modern history. ICNF density makes it the natural choice for back-testing: the most burned pixels per unit effort and the biggest single lever on N(burned assets). Was the original pilot before being demoted to alternative (see docs/aoi_rationale.md). Bbox intentionally oversized (~52 x 55 km) to capture the full 2017 complex extent (Pedrógão + Pampilhosa + Lousã). Source: originally pilot.geojson; archived as alt_pedrogao_grande.geojson 2026-05-07; promoted to first-class validation AOI 2026-06-16.
properties.source: Promoted from data/aoi/alt_pedrogao_grande.geojson. Coordinates unchanged from original (bbox validated via scripts/00_overpass_smoke.py against OSM power_tower coverage). Fire event: ICNF report on June–October 2017 fires.
properties.icnf_coverage: dense — ICNF canonical burned-area perimeters from 2017 present and finalised
properties.validation_notes: Bbox matches the region validated in scripts/00_overpass_smoke.py (>0 power=tower features confirmed). Size exceeds 30x30 km spec — accepted as historical precedent and intentional to maximise burned-asset count.
